name: jq
description: Process JSON data using a query language. Reads from standard input or files, applies a JSON filter to transform the input, and outputs the result as JSON. Supports input as JSON entities (whitespace-separated) or raw text (with --raw-input), and output formatting options. Use for filtering, transforming, and manipulating JSON documents, such as extracting fields, aggregating data, or converting between JSON structures.

input.description: JSON data provided via standard input (whitespace-separated entities) or files as command-line arguments. The first argument is the JSON filter expression.

output.description: Transformed JSON data, one JSON entity per line, or a single JSON object if the filter produces a single result.
